items.title: First raised bed felt approachable
items.quote: I was nervous about assembling a metal bed, but the panels lined up well and it felt like a good first vegetable garden kit.

items.title: Soil volume unclear before checkout
items.quote: How many bags of soil do I need for the 9-in-1 rectangle? I do not want to buy the bed and then guess at the garden center.

items.title: Competitor rust concern
items.quote: A competing metal bed looked good at first, but after one season the coating started to chip near the screws.

items.title: Patio fit question
items.quote: Customer has a 7 by 4 foot patio edge and wants to know if the rectangle layout leaves enough walking room.

items.title: Tomato setup performs well on TikTok
items.quote: Comments keep asking which trellis fits this raised bed because the tomato video makes the setup look easy.

items.title: Price justification thread
items.quote: A gardening group compared cheaper beds and asked what makes VEGO worth paying more for beyond the look.

items.title: Search demand for tomato beds
items.quote: Search queries around best raised bed for tomatoes and how deep for tomatoes are increasing week over week.

items.title: Install guide needs clearer order
items.quote: The bed is sturdy once built, but the booklet did not make the panel order obvious for the L-shape layout.

items.title: White color works for patio
items.quote: The classic white bed looks clean next to our patio furniture and does not feel like a farm supply product.

items.title: Cover system pre-sale question
items.quote: Customer asked whether the cover system should be bought with the first bed or only after seedlings are planted.
